title: Verify trial-corner-widget-viewed event triggers correctly
description: Test that the analytics event 'trial-corner-widget-viewed' fires with correct variant attribute when user views the trial widget

steps.description: 1. Login with user having active trial
4. Check analytics payload for event name and attributes

expected_result: Event 'trial-corner-widget-viewed' fires with correct variant attribute (home-trial active/pause/cancel, pill, manage subscription)
